mapper.select: SELECT r.id FROM cga_record r WHERE r.patient_id = #{patientId} AND r.del_flag = '0' AND r.scale_id IN (0, 1) -- 排序规则：优先展示scale_id=0的记录，再按创建时间、ID倒序取最新 ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.scale_id = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.create_time DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT report.patient_id, report.case_no, report.name, report.gender, report.height, report.birthday, report.age, report.phone, report.id_card, report.live_situation, report.care_situation, report.pay_type, report.income_source, report.record_id, report.user_id, report.total_score, report.result, report.suggest, report.answer_json, report.create_time, report.update_time, report.scale_id, report.scale_name, report.scale_code, report.scale_total_score, report.remark, report.raw_score FROM ( SELECT p.id AS patient_id, p.medical_case_no AS case_no, p.name, p.gender, p.height, p.birthday, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.birthday, CURDATE()) AS age, p.phone, p.id_card, p.live_situation, p.care_situation, p.pay_type, p.income_source, p.update_time, r.id AS record_id, r.user_id, r.total_score, r.result, r.suggest, r.answer_json, r.create_time, s.id AS scale_id, s.scale_name, s.code AS scale_code, s.total_score AS scale_total_score, s.remark, -- 计算各量表原始得分：从答案JSON中提取每题分数并求和，无得分则默认0 COALESCE(SUM( CASE -- 题目答案为对象格式时，提取对象中的score字段 WHEN JSON_TYPE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.answer_json, CONCAT('$."', q.id, '"'))) = 'OBJECT' THEN CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.answer_json, CONCAT('$."', q.id, '".score'))) AS SIGNED) -- 题目答案为直接数值格式时，直接提取值 ELSE CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(r.answer_json, CONCAT('$."', q.id, '"'))) AS SIGNED) END ), 0) AS raw_score FROM cga_record r LEFT JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cga_scale s ON s.del_flag = '0' AND s.id BETWEEN 1 AND 21 AND s.code IN ( 'basic_adl', 'instrumental_adl', 'exercise_function', 'vision_assessment', 'hearing_assessment', 'home_environment', 'frail_assessment', 'incontinence_screen', 'constipation_screen', 'sleep_disorder_screen', 'chronic_pain_screen', 'pressure_injury_risk', 'water_swallowing_test', 'nutrition_risk_screen', 'sarcopenia_screen', 'cognition_screen', 'delirium_assessment', 'depression_screen', 'anxiety_screen', 'fall_risk_screen', 'polypharmacy_assessment' ) LEFT JOIN cga_question q ON q.scale_id = s.id AND q.del_flag = '0' WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.del_flag = '0' AND s.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY p.id, p.medical_case_no, p.name, p.gender, p.height, p.birthday, p.phone, p.id_card, p.live_situation, p.care_situation, p.pay_type, p.income_source, p.update_time, r.id, r.user_id, r.total_score, r.result, r.suggest, r.answer_json, r.create_time, s.id, s.scale_name, s.code, s.total_score, s.remark ) report ORDER BY report.scale_id
